reviews.review_title: New fan game and updates it needs/maps
reviews.review_description:
So I find this game really cool and stuff but it needs a little more work on it because the map is so dead,I would recommend a horror/ a gun game mode, and also you should add trees and a shop on the top of the surface. But really this game is fun sad you took down the only up but yeah y’all should join Frr to get an O.G ticket before this game comes popular 💪☝️☝️💯   

ALSO THE DISCORD LINK DOESN’T WORK!

developer_response.body:
you r really cool he could get moderator and I'm gonna fix the discord link too, but the shop was gonna be  horror it was too hard for me. Next update you're gonna have to re-bye OG badge Cuz Phone updated. your cool.
